allow: PowerShell($html = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sub-store-latest-otlc.onrender.com/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "HTML: $\($html.Content\)"; Write-Output "---"; $main = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sub-store-latest-otlc.onrender.com/main.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "main.js size: $\($main.Content.Length\)")

PowerShell($reg = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sub-store-latest-otlc.onrender.com/registerSW.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "registerSW.js: $\($reg.Content.Length\) bytes"; $css = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://sub-store-latest-otlc.onrender.com/main.css" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "main.css: $\($css.Content.Length\) bytes")
